parents.subject: LU-17242 libcfs: require sched_show_task() for thread dumping

commit.subject: LU-18687 compat: move apply_workqueue_attrs() import to symbols.c
commit.message:
LU-18687 compat: move apply_workqueue_attrs() import to symbols.c

Move apply_workqueue_attrs() import to the standard location
for importing symbols, lustre_compat/symbols.c.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: Iad8cba736efe18b9a62b9db683416c433a9a2837
